name: Bean and Corn Burritos
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Can light red kidney beans, drained and mashed
1/2 cup Frozen whole kernel corn, thawed and drained
3/4 cup Shredded reduced fat sharp Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a small nonstick skillet with cooking spray; place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add onion, green pepper, jalapeno pepper, and garlic; sauté until tender.
3. Stir in cumin and white pepper. Cook 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat; stir in mashed beans and corn.
5. Spread half of the bean mixture evenly over the surface of each tortilla.
6. Sprinkle three tablespoons cheese down the center of each tortilla.
7. Roll up the tortillas, placing seam side down on a medium baking sheet.
8. Bake at 425°F for 7 to 8 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
9. For each serving, top each burrito with one cup salsa and one tablespoon sour cream.
10. If desired, garnish with jalapeno pepper slices and fresh cilantro sprigs.
Yield: 4 servings (355 calories per serving). Fat: 7.8g (Sat: 3.2g, Mono: 2.6g, Poly: 1.2g) Protein: 18.5g Carbohydrate: 57.1g Fiber: 5.4g Cholesterol: 14 mg Sodium: 316mg
